variables.notes: Selected debt-current-maturity labels only, excluding lease-related rows. Multiple labels are included as year-to-year alternatives; they should not be summed simultaneously if they refer to the same reporting year.
No clear balance-sheet row for taxes payable/current tax liabilities payable. The available tax-related line refers to social security and taxes other than income tax, so it is not TXP.

candidates.row_label: Computer Software & Equipment - Tangible Assets - Gross
candidates.why: Contains tangible assets, but mixed with computer software and is gross rather than clear total net PPE.

candidates.why: Contra-asset line, not PPE total.
Intangible, not PPE.

candidates.why: Intangible contra-asset, not PPE.
Intangible, not PPE.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Other - Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Net PPE wording but appears to be a balancing line rather than a clean reported total.

candidates.why: Balancing value and mixed software/equipment, not ideal for PPEGT.

candidates.why: Lease-related right-of-use assets, not baseline PPE preference.

Cash flow capex for intangibles, not balance-sheet PPE.
